summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Stripe checkout integration and booking flow. All backend APIs working correctly (17/17 tests passed). Frontend booking flow, form validation, and language selector all functioning properly.
passed_tests: Backend: /api/experience-prices returns correct prices for all 3 experiences
Backend: self-defense price €1490, deposit €447 (30%)
Backend: visual-storytelling price €1690, deposit €507 (30%)
Backend: language-practice price €890, deposit €267 (30%)
Backend: POST /api/bookings/checkout creates Stripe session with correct deposit amount
Backend: Checkout validates experience_id (returns 400 for invalid)
Backend: Checkout validates email format (returns 422 for invalid)
Backend: Checkout calculates correct total for multiple participants
Backend: GET /api/bookings/payment-status/{session_id} returns payment status
Backend: GET /api/bookings/{booking_id} returns booking details
Backend: POST /api/webhook/stripe endpoint exists
Frontend: BookPage loads correctly with 3 experience options
Frontend: Step 1 - Experience selection works (Self-Defense, Language, Visual Storytelling)
Frontend: Step 2 - City selection and weekend calendar navigation works
Frontend: Step 3 - Weekend calendar shows alternating Marrakech/Agadir cities
Frontend: Step 3 - Weekend selection works correctly
Frontend: Step 4 - Form displays all required fields (Name, Email, Phone, Language, Message)
Frontend: Step 4 - Email validation shows 'Invalid email format' error on blur
Frontend: Step 4 - Phone validation shows 'Invalid or incomplete phone number' error on blur
Frontend: Step 4 - Summary shows correct pricing with Early Bird discount (-8%)
Frontend: Step 4 - 'Pay Deposit (30%)' button visible
Frontend: BookSuccessPage handles invalid session_id correctly (shows 'Payment Issue' state)
Frontend: BookSuccessPage shows 'Try Again' and 'Back to Home' buttons for failed payments
Frontend: Language selector works - switches between 6 languages (EN, FR, ES, PT, DE, IT)
Frontend: Language change updates all page content correctly
seed_data_creation: Test bookings created via API during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stripe checkout integration fully tested. Experience prices: self-defense=€1490, visual-storytelling=€1690, language-practice=€890. Deposit is 30% of total. Checkout API creates Stripe session and returns checkout_url. BookSuccessPage polls /api/bookings/payment-status/{session_id} to verify payment. Form validation works on blur for email and phone fields.

form_validation_tested.email: Real-time validation on blur - shows 'Invalid email format' for invalid emails
form_validation_tested.phone: Real-time validation on blur - shows 'Invalid or incomplete phone number' for invalid phones
form_validation_tested.blocked_domains: test.com, example.com, mailinator.com, etc. are blocked
